mapper.select:
select sys_id, common_cd, common_nm, use_yn from sys_common_master where 1=1
and ( common_cd like concat('%', #{searchCond}, '%') or common_nm like concat('%', #{searchCond}, '%') )
and delete_yn = 'N' order by common_cd asc
mapper.insert: insert into sys_common_master ( sys_id, common_cd, common_nm, use_yn, delete_yn, insert_datetime, insert_user_id, modify_datetime, modify_user_id, sys_plant_cd ) values ( #{commonMaster.sysId}, #{commonMaster.commonCd}, #{commonMaster.commonNm}, #{commonMaster.useYn}, 'N', now(), #{userId}, null, null, null )
mapper.select: select COUNT(*) > 0 from sys_common_master where 1=1 and common_cd = #{commonCd}
mapper.delete:
update sys_common_master set delete_yn = 'Y', modify_datetime = now(), modify_user_id = #{userId} where 1=1 and sys_id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select sys_id, common_cd, common_nm, use_yn from sys_common_master where 1=1 and sys_id = #{sysId}
